claim: Crunchbase Pro costs $49/month annual or $99/month monthly
quote: Pro at $49/mo (annual) or $99/mo monthly

claim: PitchBook pricing ranges from $12,000 to $70,000+ per year
quote: PitchBook pricing ranges from $12,000 to $70,000+ per year

claim: CB Insights median contract value is approximately $47,000/year
quote: the median contract runs $46,984/year

claim: VCBacked costs $79/month with database of 16,000+ startups
quote: VCBacked gives you founder emails for recently funded startups at $79/month

claim: Fundraise Insider offers one-time payment of $149 for lifetime weekly leads
quote: Full Stack is $149 for weekly verified leads for life

claim: OpenVC is completely free with 16,000+ verified investor profiles
quote: Yes, OpenVC is completely free to use

claim: SEC Form D is filed within 15 days of first sale and is public record
quote: Every US company that raises equity funding files a Form D with the SEC

claim: Google Alerts catches less than 30% of relevant funding rounds
quote: Most users report catching less than 30% of relevant rounds through Google Alerts alone

claim: Ideal outreach window is 1-4 weeks after funding announcement
quote: The ideal window for reaching out to recently funded startups is 1-4 weeks after the funding announcement

claim: Apollo.io offers free tier with 50 email credits/month
quote: Free: $0 — 50 credits, 5 mobile credits

claim: Harmonic tracks 35M+ companies and 195M+ people
quote: 35 million companies and 195 million people profiles

claim: Cold outreach to funded startups converts at 2-5%
quote: Cold outreach to funded startups converts at roughly 2-5% when personalized

claim: Hunter.io Starter costs $34/month for 500 searches with $0.09 per verified contact
quote: Hunter.io Starter: $49 flat, 500 searches, ~$0.10 email unit cost

claim: PhantomBuster can automate LinkedIn prospecting for funded startups with Watcher Mode
quote: Enable Watcher Mode to automatically detect new companies that match your criteria over time

claim: Databar offers waterfall enrichment across multiple data providers
quote: waterfall enrichment approach, which tries multiple providers in sequence

claim: Crunchbase Pro export caps limit heavy prospecting
quote: Pro plan caps exports at 2,000 rows — heavy prospecting teams hit this quickly

claim: PitchBook has no free tier and no monthly option
quote: No free tier. No monthly option

claim: CB Insights pricing is enterprise-level and prohibitive for startups
quote: CB Insights is one of the most expensive market intelligence platforms available. At $50,000-$265,000+ per year

claim: VCBacked offers unlimited CSV exports
quote: Unlimited exports. No credit throttling or CSV limits

claim: Wellfound shows salary and equity information upfront
quote: View salary, stock options, and more before applying

claim: SEC Form D filings and LinkedIn founder announcements are freshest data sources
quote: Form D is necessary but not sufficient. LinkedIn is the actual firehose

claim: Crunchbase captures 60-70% of seed rounds and 85-90% of Series A+
quote: Crunchbase Free: ~60-70% coverage at seed, 85-90% at Series A+

claim: Dealroom is strongest for European startup ecosystems
quote: Dealroom is a global startup intelligence platform with deep coverage of emerging ecosystems (especially Europe)

claim: Revli offers free forever plan for funded startup data
quote: Revli offers a free forever plan along with affordable premium plans
